text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I know I'm still missing something...<n>Something
important...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Oi Racecourse. Dirt. A track so close<n>and yet so
far, like a foreign land.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby. It feels kinda<n>different from
the central races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Could it be the sweltering heat of<n>summer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The track, the scenery, the turf, and<n>the dirt are all
different too. But even<n>if those are all different...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everyone's feelings stay<n>the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just thinking... each race<n>I've seen
has been something big<n>and special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The NHK Mile Cup is an important<n>goal for
milers—a highlight of their<n>youth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is the stage for<n>Opera O's
and Doto's showdown...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought that's why they were so
exciting—because they all just<n>happened to be
special, high-profile<n>turf races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But... if the runners today hold that<n>same intensity
here at a dirt race,<n>which is different in almost
every<n>way...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then I think I can say I've grasped<n>the true,
underlying reason why<n>Umamusume are so
special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is my chance to make certain!<n>Together
with the dirt Umas here in Oi!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, in the Derby of dirt racing,<n>she will find the
answer she seeks.
